channel.title: RAG on Sharad Raj
channel.description: Recent content in RAG on Sharad Raj

item.title: Agentic RAG Workflows: Building Tool-Using Agents
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a cornerstone of modern AI systems, enabling language models to access external knowledge bases and provide more accurate, contextual responses. However, static RAG systems have limitations when dealing with complex queries that require multiple steps or tool interactions.
